title: asplenium cuneifolium subsp. cuneifolium
intro: Asplenium cuneifolium subsp. cuneifolium, also known as the wedge fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Aspleniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Asplenium cuneifolium subsp. cuneifolium include its ability to treat various conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a diuretic and to treat digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
